<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Ron Levy — Paintings</title> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <style> *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } :root { --white: #ffffff; --off-white: #f5f5f7; --mid-gray: #6e6e73; --dark: #1d1d1f; --accent: #0071e3; --nav-h: 52px; --ease: cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); --serif: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; --sans: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: var(--sans); background: var(--white); color: var(--dark); overflow-x: hidden; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } /* NAV */ nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200; height: var(--nav-h); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; } .nav-logo { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 17px; color: var(--dark); text-decoration: none; } .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 0; list-style: none; } .nav-links a { font-size: 13px; color: var(--dark); text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 13px; border-radius: 6px; opacity: 0.75; transition: opacity 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { opacity: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .has-sub { position: relative; } .has-sub:hover .sub-menu { display: block; } .sub-menu { display: none; position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 12px; min-width: 210px; padding: 8px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); margin-top: 4px; z-index: 10; } .sub-menu a { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--dark); border-radius: 6px; opacity: 1; } .sub-menu a:hover { background: rgba(0,113,227,0.08); color: var(--accent); } .nav-cta { font-size: 13px; color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 16px; border-radius: 980px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.35); transition: all 0.2s; } .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--accent); color: white; } .hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; } .hamburger span { display: block; width: 20px; height: 1.5px; background: var(--dark); border-radius: 2px; } /* HERO */ .hero { min-height: 100vh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; background: #f5f5f7; overflow: hidden; } .hero-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; padding: 80px 64px 80px; padding-top: calc(var(--nav-h) + 80px); } .hero-right { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3px; overflow: hidden; height: 100vh; } .hero-right img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; transition: transform 0.7s ease; } .hero-right img:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .hero-right img:nth-child(1) { grid-row: span 2; } .hero-eyebrow { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 22px; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s var(--ease) 0.1s forwards; text-align: left; } .hero-h1 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(40px, 5vw, 72px); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.03em; max-width: 540px; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s var(--ease) 0.22s forwards; text-align: left; } .hero-h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--mid-gray); } .hero-sub { font-size: clamp(16px, 2.2vw, 20px); color: var(--mid-gray); max-width: 500px; line-height: 1.65; margin-top: 28px; font-weight: 300; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s var(--ease) 0.38s forwards; text-align: left; } .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 48px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-start; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s var(--ease) 0.5s forwards; } .btn-dark { background: var(--dark); color: #fff; padding: 13px 26px; border-radius: 980px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .btn-dark:hover { background: #3a3a3c; transform: scale(1.02); } .btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--accent); padding: 13px 26px; border-radius: 980px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; border: 1.5px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.35); transition: all 0.2s; } .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--accent); transform: scale(1.02); } /* QUOTE */ .quote { background: var(--dark); padding: 88px 24px; text-align: center; } .quote q { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(22px, 3.5vw, 38px); font-style: italic; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); max-width: 700px; display: block; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.4; } .quote cite { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); margin-top: 22px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-style: normal; } /* STORY */ .story { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } .story-copy { background: var(--off-white); padding: 96px 72px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; } .story-copy h2 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 44px); font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1.15; } .story-copy p { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--mid-gray); margin-top: 18px; font-weight: 300; } .story-photo { overflow: hidden; min-height: 480px; } .story-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; transition: transform 0.7s var(--ease); } .story-photo:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); } /* SEC */ .sec { padding: 96px 24px; } .sec-hd { max-width: 1240px; margin: 0 auto 52px; } .sec-title { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(30px, 4.5vw, 50px); font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1.1; margin-top: 10px; } .sec-desc { font-size: 16px; color: var(--mid-gray); line-height: 1.7; margin-top: 12px; font-weight: 300; max-width: 560px; } /* COLLECTION GRID */ .coll-grid { max-width: 1240px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: 3px; } .cc { position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; background: #ccc; } .cc img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; transition: transform 0.7s var(--ease); } .cc:hover img { transform: scale(1.07); } .cc:nth-child(1) { grid-column: span 5; grid-row: span 2; min-height: 580px; } .cc:nth-child(2) { grid-column: span 4; aspect-ratio: 4/3; } .cc:nth-child(3) { grid-column: span 3; aspect-ratio: 4/3; } .cc:nth-child(4) { grid-column: span 4; aspect-ratio: 4/3; } .cc:nth-child(5) { grid-column: span 3; aspect-ratio: 4/3; } .cc-ov { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 55%, transparent 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 24px; transition: background 0.3s; } .cc:hover .cc-ov { background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 60%, transparent 100%); } .cc-cat { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom: 4px; } .cc-name { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 24px; color: white; line-height: 1.2; } .cc-sub { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.62); margin-top: 3px; } .cc-arrow { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; width: 30px; height: 30px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-size: 13px; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); transition: all 0.3s; } .cc:hover .cc-arrow { opacity: 1; transform: none; } /* GALLERY */ .gallery-sec { background: var(--off-white); } .gallery-top { max-width: 1240px; margin: 0 auto 40px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; } .tabs { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .tab { padding: 7px 15px; border-radius: 980px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.14); background: transparent; color: var(--dark); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .tab.on { background: var(--dark); color: white; border-color: var(--dark); } .tab:hover:not(.on) { border-color: var(--dark); } .g-grid { max-width: 1240px; margin: 0 auto; columns: 5; column-gap: 10px; } .gi { break-inside: avoid; margin-bottom: 10px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 8px; background: #ddd; } .gi img { width: 100%; display: block; transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease); } .gi:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); } .gi-cap { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 24px 10px 8px; background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.6)); color: white; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px; } .gi:hover .gi-cap { opacity: 1; } /* ABOUT */ .about-inner { max-width: 1240px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; } .about-img { position: relative; } .about-img img { width: 100%; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 30px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); object-fit: cover; aspect-ratio: 3/4; display: block; } .about-badge { position: absolute; bottom: 20px; right: -16px; background: var(--dark); color: white; border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px 18px; box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .about-badge strong { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 32px; font-weight: 400; display: block; } .about-badge small { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); display: block; margin-top: 2px; } .about-text .sec-desc p + p { margin-top: 14px; } .about-text .sec-desc { max-width: 100%; } /* CONTACT */ .contact { background: var(--dark); text-align: center; padding: 120px 24px; } .contact .label { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); } .contact .sec-title { color: white; margin: 10px auto 0; } .contact .sec-desc { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin: 14px auto 0; text-align: center; } .cta-link { display: inline-block; margin-top: 44px; font-size: 19px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.3); padding-bottom: 2px; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .cta-link:hover { border-color: var(--accent); } /* FOOTER */ footer { background: var(--off-white); border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); padding: 32px 24px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; } footer p { font-size: 12px; color: var(--mid-gray); } .fl { display: flex; gap: 18px; } .fl a { font-size: 12px; color: var(--mid-gray); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .fl a:hover { color: var(--dark); } /* LIGHTBOX */ .lb { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 500; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.93); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px; } .lb.open { display: flex; } .lb-inner { position: relative; max-width: min(90vw, 900px); width: 100%; text-align: center; } .lb-img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 82vh; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); object-fit: contain; display: block; margin: 0 auto; } .lb-x { position: absolute; top: -46px; right: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: none; color: white; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 0.2s; } .lb-x:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); } .lb-nav { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: none; color: white; width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 0.2s; } .lb-nav:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .lb-p { left: -58px; } .lb-n { right: -58px; } .lb-cap { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 13px; margin-top: 16px; font-family: var(--serif); font-style: italic; } .lb-num { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); font-size: 11px; margin-top: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } /* MOB MENU */ .mob { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 300; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 28px; } .mob.open { display: flex; } .mob a { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 30px; color: var(--dark); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .mob a:hover { color: var(--accent); } .mob-x { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 20px; background: none; border: none; font-size: 30px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--dark); } /* REVEAL */ .{ opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); transition: opacity 0.7s var(--ease), transform 0.7s var(--ease); } ..vis { opacity: 1; transform: none; } /* Fallback: if JS observer fails, show after 1s */ .{ animation: -fallback 0s 1s forwards; } @keyframes -fallback { to { opacity: 1; transform: none; } } @keyframes fadeUp { to { opacity: 1; transform: none; } } /* RESPONSIVE */ @media (max-width: 1100px) { .g-grid { columns: 4; } } @media (max-width: 860px) { .nav-links, .nav-cta { display: none; } .hamburger { display: flex; } .story { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .story-photo { min-height: 360px; } .story-copy { padding: 56px 32px; } .coll-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } .cc:nth-child(n) { grid-column: span 1; min-height: auto; aspect-ratio: 4/3; } .g-grid { columns: 3; } .about-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .about-badge { right: 12px; } .lb-p { left: -8px; } .lb-n { right: -8px; } } @media (max-width: 540px) { .g-grid { columns: 2; } .coll-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } footer { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; } } </style> </head> <body> <!-- NAV --> <nav> <a class="nav-logo" href="#">Ron Levy</a> <ul class="nav-links"> <li class="has-sub"><a href="#gallery">Music ▾</a> <div class="sub-menu"> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('portraits')">Portraits of Musicians</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('duets')">Duets</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('instruments')">Musical Instruments</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('songs')">Songs</a> </div> </li> <li class="has-sub"><a href="#gallery">My Jerusalem ▾</a> <div class="sub-menu"> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('jerusalem')">Childhood Memories</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('jerusalem')">Nachlaot Neighborhood</a> </div> </li> <li class="has-sub"><a href="#gallery">Landscape ▾</a> <div class="sub-menu"> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('landscape')">Rural Landscape</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('landscape')">Emek Yizrael</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('landscape')">Sea of Galilee</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('landscape')">Urban Landscape</a> </div> </li> <li class="has-sub"><a href="#gallery">Interior ▾</a> <div class="sub-menu"> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('interior')">With View</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('interior')">Without View</a> </div> </li> <li><a href="#gallery" onclick="go('people')">People</a></li> <li><a href="#about">About</a></li> </ul> <a class="nav-cta" href="#contact">Contact</a> <div class="hamburger" onclick="toggleMob()"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div> </nav> <!-- MOBILE MENU --> <div class="mob" id="mobMenu"> <button class="mob-x" onclick="toggleMob()">×</button> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('all');toggleMob()">All Works</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('portraits');toggleMob()">Music</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('jerusalem');toggleMob()">Jerusalem</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('landscape');toggleMob()">Landscape</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('interior');toggleMob()">Interior</a> <a href="#gallery" onclick="go('people');toggleMob()">People</a> <a href="#about" onclick="toggleMob()">About</a> </div> <!-- HERO --> <section class="hero"> <div class="hero-left"> <p class="hero-eyebrow">The Paintings of Ron Levy</p> <h1 class="hero-h1">Music.<br><em>Landscape.</em><br>Memory.</h1> <p class="hero-sub">A self-taught painter. Pianist. A life redrawn — stroke by stroke — beginning in the middle of a pandemic.</p> <div class="hero-btns"> <a href="#gallery" class="btn-dark">Explore all works</a> <a href="#about" class="btn-ghost">Read the story</a> </div> </div> <div class="hero-right"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/Sol-Gabetta-756x1024-640x480.jpeg" alt="Sol Gabetta" loading="eager"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/Interior-with-view-5-1024x790-640x480.jpeg" alt="Interior" loading="eager"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/Sea-Abstract-2-1007x1024-640x480.jpeg" alt="Sea of Galilee" loading="eager"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/WhatsApp-Image-2025-09-27-at-22.52.55-1-731x1024-640x480.jpeg" alt="Figure" loading="eager"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/WhatsApp-Image-2025-08-26-at-10.54.58-1005x1024-640x480.jpeg" alt="Jerusalem" loading="eager"> </div> </section> <!-- QUOTE --> <div class="quote"> <q>I married a pianist, and now I live with a painter.</q> <cite>— Ron Levy's partner</cite> </div> <!-- STORY --> <div class="story"> <div class="story-copy"> <p class="label">The Beginning</p> <h2>A blank canvas<br>at seventy</h2> <p>Inspired by Professor Yoram Yovell's lecture on preserving cognitive vitality, Ron Levy picked up a pencil for the first time — secretly tracing diagonal lines on plain paper. He had never sketched, never held a brush.</p> <p>As a musician who started studying cello at eight, he sought something entirely foreign. Within weeks he was painting on canvas — trees, clouds, water, reflections. Several hours every day.</p> </div> <div class="story-photo"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/20250106_224906.jpg" alt="Rural Landscape — Ron Levy"> </div> </div> <!-- COLLECTIONS --> <section class="sec" id="collections" style="background:var(--white)"> <div class="sec-hd "> <p class="label">Collections</p> <h2 class="sec-title">Five bodies of work</h2> </div> <div class="coll-grid "> <div class="cc" onclick="go('portraits')"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/Sergio-Celibidache-731x1024-640x480.jpeg" alt="Music" loading="lazy"> <div class="cc-ov"><span class="cc-cat">Collection I</span><h3 class="cc-name">Music</h3><p class="cc-sub">Portraits · Duets · Instruments · Songs</p></div> <div class="cc-arrow">↗</div> </div> <div class="cc" onclick="go('jerusalem')"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/20250720_084558-scaled.jpg" alt="Jerusalem" loading="lazy"> <div class="cc-ov"><span class="cc-cat">Collection II</span><h3 class="cc-name">My Jerusalem</h3><p class="cc-sub">Childhood · Nachlaot</p></div> <div class="cc-arrow">↗</div> </div> <div class="cc" onclick="go('landscape')"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/20250106_224906.jpg" alt="Landscape" loading="lazy"> <div class="cc-ov"><span class="cc-cat">Collection III</span><h3 class="cc-name">Landscape</h3><p class="cc-sub">Rural · Emek · Galilee · Urban</p></div> <div class="cc-arrow">↗</div> </div> <div class="cc" onclick="go('interior')"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/Interior-with-view-5-1024x790-640x480.jpeg" alt="Interior" loading="lazy"> <div class="cc-ov"><span class="cc-cat">Collection IV</span><h3 class="cc-name">Interior</h3><p class="cc-sub">With view · Without view</p></div> <div class="cc-arrow">↗</div> </div> <div class="cc" onclick="go('people')"> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/WhatsApp-Image-2025-09-27-at-22.52.55-4-722x1024-640x480.jpeg" alt="People" loading="lazy"> <div class="cc-ov"><span class="cc-cat">Collection V</span><h3 class="cc-name">People</h3><p class="cc-sub">The human figure</p></div> <div class="cc-arrow">↗</div> </div> </div> </section> <!-- GALLERY --> <section class="sec gallery-sec" id="gallery"> <div class="gallery-top "> <div><p class="label">Gallery</p><h2 class="sec-title">All works</h2></div> <div class="tabs"> <button class="tab on" onclick="filter('all',this)">All</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('portraits',this)">Portraits</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('duets',this)">Duets</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('instruments',this)">Instruments</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('songs',this)">Songs</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('jerusalem',this)">Jerusalem</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('landscape',this)">Landscape</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('interior',this)">Interior</button> <button class="tab" onclick="filter('people',this)">People</button> </div> </div> <div class="g-grid" id="gGrid"> <!-- PORTRAITS (11) --> <div class="gi" data-cat="portraits" onclick="lbOpen(this)"><img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/Sol-Gabetta-756x1024-640x480.jpeg" data-full="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/Sol-Gabetta-756x1024-640x480.jpeg" alt="Sol Gabetta" loading="lazy"><div class="gi-cap">Sol Gabetta</div></div> <div class="gi" data-cat="portraits" onclick="lbOpen(this)"><img </section> <!-- ABOUT --> <section class="sec" id="about" style="background:var(--white)"> <div class="about-inner"> <div class="about-img "> <img src="Ron%20Levy%20%E2%80%94%20Paintings_files/main-picture-576x1024.jpeg" alt="Ron Levy"> <div class="about-badge"><strong>2020</strong><small>Painting began</small></div> </div> <div class=""> <p class="label">About Ron Levy</p> <h2 class="sec-title">My story,<br>not a biography</h2> <div class="sec-desc"> <p>I began painting during the COVID-19 pandemic, at a relatively late stage in life, inspired by Professor Yoram Yovell's televised lecture on maintaining brain vitality and preventing cognitive decline.</p> <p>As a musician who had started studying the cello at eight, I sought an area completely unfamiliar. I had never doodled with a pencil or held a paintbrush. I began cautiously — secretly drawing straight and diagonal lines on plain paper.</p> <p>The transition from sketching to painting was swift. With online tutorials I taught myself acrylics on canvas — trees, clouds, water, reflections. Several hours each day, gaining immense joy from the process.</p> <p>Since then I have remained a self-taught painter, committed to daily practice with passion and deep gratitude to Professor Yovell for bringing new meaning to my life.</p> </div> </div> </div> </section> <!-- CONTACT --> <section class="sec contact" id="contact"> <p class="label">Get in touch</p> <h2 class="sec-title">Interested in a painting?</h2> <p class="sec-desc">For inquiries about availability, prints, or commissions, please reach out directly.</p> <a class="cta-link" href="#" onclick="var a='dronlevy',b='gmail.com';window.location='mailto:'+a+'@'+b;return false;" target="_blank">Contact Ron →</a> </section> <!-- FOOTER --> <footer> <p>© 2026 Ron Levy. All rights reserved.</p> <div class="fl"> <a href="#" onclick="go('portraits')">Music</a> <a href="#" onclick="go('jerusalem')">Jerusalem</a> <a href="#" onclick="go('landscape')">Landscape</a> <a href="#" onclick="go('interior')">Interior</a> <a href="#" onclick="go('people')">People</a> <a href="#contact">Contact</a> </div> </footer> <!-- LIGHTBOX --> <div class="lb" id="lbBox" onclick="lbOut(event)"> <div class="lb-inner"> <button class="lb-x" onclick="lbClose()">×</button> <button class="lb-nav lb-p" onclick="lbNav(-1)">‹</button> <img class="lb-img" id="lbImg" src="" alt=""> <button class="lb-nav lb-n" onclick="lbNav(1)">›</button> <p class="lb-cap" id="lbCap"></p> <p class="lb-num" id="lbNum"></p> </div> </div> <script> // Scroll reveal const obs = new IntersectionObserver(es => es.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('vis'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } }), { threshold: 0.05, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' }); // Also immediately show any elements already in viewport on load document.querySelectorAll('.').forEach(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.top < window.innerHeight) el.classList.add('vis'); }); document.querySelectorAll('.').forEach(el => obs.observe(el)); // Mobile menu function toggleMob() { document.getElementById('mobMenu').classList.toggle('open'); } // Filter gallery function filter(cat, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('on')); btn.classList.add('on'); document.querySelectorAll('.gi').forEach(el => { el.style.display = (cat === 'all' || el.dataset.cat === cat) ? 'block' : 'none'; }); } // Navigate to section and filter function go(cat) { setTimeout(() => { const btn = [...document.querySelectorAll('.tab')].find(b => b.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === cat) || [...document.querySelectorAll('.tab')].find(b => b.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().includes(cat)) || document.querySelector('.tab'); if (btn) filter(cat === 'all' ? 'all' : cat, btn); }, 400); document.getElementById('gallery').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); } // Lightbox let lbItems = [], lbIdx = 0; function lbOpen(el) { lbItems = [...document.querySelectorAll('.gi')].filter(e => e.style.display !== 'none'); lbIdx = lbItems.indexOf(el); lbShow(lbIdx); document.getElementById('lbBox').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function lbShow(i) { const el = lbItems[i]; const img = el.querySelector('img'); document.getElementById('lbImg').src = img.dataset.full || img.src; document.getElementById('lbCap').textContent = el.querySelector('.gi-cap')?.textContent || img.alt; document.getElementById('lbNum').textContent = (i + 1) + ' of ' + lbItems.length; } function lbNav(d) { lbIdx = (lbIdx + d + lbItems.length) % lbItems.length; lbShow(lbIdx); } function lbClose() { document.getElementById('lbBox').classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } function lbOut(e) { if (e.target.id === 'lbBox') lbClose(); } document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (!document.getElementById('lbBox').classList.contains('open')) return
